attacking_style: Bridges to leading selections with powerful, high-gear efforts rather than initiating attacks. Opportunistic when wind splits create gaps.
team_tactics: Rides as domestique but capitalizes on racing opportunities when positioned well in wind-split scenarios.
terrain_preference: Windy, flat classics where echelon formation and power output matter more than pure climbing or sprinting ability.
vulnerability: Insufficient data to identify specific weaknesses, though domestique role suggests limited autonomy in team-protected scenarios.
key_patterns: Bridges to leading groups using exceptional power/gear pushing ability in crosswinds
Converts domestique positioning into personal results when race fragments in wind
Performs above domestique role expectations in classics featuring echelon splits
form_trajectory: unknown: single observation shows strong wind-riding capability but insufficient recent data for trajectory assessment
